title: Aptitude: Trains, Boats, and Streams - Q7

content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

A boatman can row a boat at the speed of 5 km/hr upstream and 15 km/hr downstream. Find the speed of the stream and the speed of the boat in still water. 

Solution: Let's denote:B as Speed of the boat in still water (km/h)S as Speed of the stream (km/h)Speed of the boat upstream is the speed of the boat in still water minus the

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

speed of the stream:

B − S = 5 km/hr...(i)

Speed of the boat downstream is the speed of the boat in still water plus the speed of the stream:

B + S = 15 km/hr...(ii)

Solving both equations

B = 10 km/h and S = 5 km/h

Hence, the speed of the boat in still water is 10 km/h

Speed of the stream is 5 km/h
